theme: Light theme by default with a clean, high-contrast Dark theme toggle. Prioritize legibility and trust (Role-Metric-Density-Action framework).

headings.instruction: Use Manrope for all headings. DO NOT use Inter for headings.

body.instruction: Clean, highly legible monospace-adjacent sans for data tables, lists, and standard text.

rules: Use high-contrast for all text (APCA standard).
Tint neutral greys slightly with blue to feel alive.
Color is for function only. Use Primary blue only for major actions (e.g., 'Create Invoice').
FORBIDDEN COLOR: teal green or teal blue (#1B93A4).
No transparent background in header, overlays, or dropdowns.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use 'Grid Borders (Technical)' for data-heavy sections like ledgers and tables. Dashboard widgets should use flat backgrounds with a 1px subtle border and no shadow.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders for definition. No soft/muddy shadows.

grids.structure: Mobile-first: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
span_logic: Main Chart (Cash Flow/Revenue): col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3

layouts.general: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content. Numbers/Currency right-aligned in tables for scannability.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing philosophy (p-6, p-8) inside containers. Ensure borders have padding.

component_name.navigation: Visible sidebar or top nav. No hamburger menus on desktop. Solid background.
component_name.cards: Dense styles, rectangular, cardless-feel or 1px border. No oversized shadows.
component_name.tables: Shadcn Table component. Clean layout for bookkeeping and payroll.

motion.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Subtle `-translate-y-1` and shadow elevation for cards on hover.
motion.transitions: Use specific transition properties (e.g. `transition-transform`, `transition-colors duration-200 ease-out`). NEVER use `transition: all`.

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., `data-testid='create-invoice-button'`).
accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 for standard text. Explicitly set text color on hover and focus states.

media.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for dense, highly legible dashboard icons.
media.images: High-contrast, contextually relevant. Empty states should use minimalist UI illustrations.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Not strictly necessary for a dense bookkeeping dashboard. Use Visx or Recharts for 2D data storytelling instead of full 3D rendering to prioritize clarity.

image_urls.description: Minimalist geometric background for the login/signup screen to add subtle texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Recharts if not present: `yarn add recharts`
For the dashboard, use the 'Role-Metric-Density-Action' framework. Place the most critical metric (e.g., Cash Runway or MRR) at the top left.
Make sure all files created/edited are `.jsx` or `.js` files, not `.tsx`.
Implement a theme toggle (Dark/Light) utilizing the Tailwind `dark:` classes.
Use standard HTML structure within React components. No `transparent` backgrounds over content.
Ensure Shadcn components are properly utilized and customized for the 'Swiss' clean look.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
DO NOT add '.App { text-align: center; }' to CSS. This disrupts natural reading flow.
Create depth with explicit z-index hierarchy and layering.
Use modern pill-shaped or sharp button styles with interaction animations.
Do not use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💡).
Add interactions to everything clickable. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
